mapper.select: SELECT t.TRANSFER_ID, t.PLANT_CD, t.TRANSFER_NO, t.TRANSFER_STATUS, t.FROM_LOCATION_ID, t.TO_LOCATION_ID, t.TRANSFER_REASON, t.REG_USER_ID, t.REG_DTM, t.UPD_USER_ID, t.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, c.COM_NM AS TRANSFER_STATUS_NM, lf.LOCATION_CD AS FROM_LOCATION_CD, lt.LOCATION_CD AS TO_LOCATION_CD FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ORDER t INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON t.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION lf ON t.FROM_LOCATION_ID = lf.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION lt ON t.TO_LOCATION_ID = lt.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_TF_STATUS' AND t.TRANSFER_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE t.TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_TRANSFER_ORDER ( PLANT_CD, TRANSFER_NO, TRANSFER_STATUS, FROM_LOCATION_ID, TO_LOCATION_ID, TRANSFER_REASON, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{transferNo}, #{transferStatus}, #{fromLocationId}, #{toLocationId}, #{transferReason}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_TRANSFER_ORDER SET FROM_LOCATION_ID = #{fromLocationId}, TO_LOCATION_ID = #{toLocationId}, TRANSFER_REASON = #{transferReason}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}
UPDATE MCS_TRANSFER_ORDER SET TRANSFER_STATUS = #{status}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ORDER WHERE TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId} AND TRANSFER_STATUS = 'REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT i.TRANSFER_ITEM_ID, i.TRANSFER_ID, i.ITEM_CD, i.LOT_NO, i.TRANSFER_QTY, i.ITEM_STATUS, i.REG_USER_ID, i.REG_DTM, i.UPD_USER_ID, i.UPD_DTM, mi.ITEM_NM, mi.ITEM_SPEC, mi.UNIT, c.COM_NM AS ITEM_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ITEM i INNER JOIN MST_ITEM mi ON i.ITEM_CD = mi.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_TF_ITEM_STATUS' AND i.ITEM_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE i.TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId} ORDER BY i.TRANSFER_ITEM_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_TRANSFER_ITEM SET ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}, LOT_NO = #{lotNo}, TRANSFER_QTY = #{transferQty}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRANSFER_ITEM_ID = #{transferItemId}
UPDATE MCS_TRANSFER_ITEM SET ITEM_STATUS = #{status}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRANSFER_ITEM_ID = #{transferItemId}
